rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is partially supported by the text, but the claims outrun what the text actually demonstrates.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is mostly present, but some claims are made without clear evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within scope, but there is one drift in the discussion of adjacent designs.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is partially supported by the text, but the strongest novelty claim is exposed to counterexample.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are mostly present, but some minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
